name: weather
author: hagency
description: Get current weather for any city worldwide via Open-Meteo (free, no API key)

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a city. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, and conditions. IMPORTANT: Always use English city names (e.g. 'Saratoga' not '萨拉托加', 'Tokyo' not '东京').

city.description: City name in English, optionally with country (e.g. 'Stockholm', 'Tokyo', 'New York, US'). Always translate non-English names to English.

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get multi-day weather forecast for a city. Returns daily high/low temperatures, conditions, precipitation, and wind. IMPORTANT: Always use English city names (e.g. 'Paris, France' not '巴黎').

city.description: City name in English, optionally with country (e.g. 'Paris, France', 'Tokyo'). Always translate non-English names to English.
